arts.ttl: Arsenal, Inter Milan on Edge After PSG’s Bold Concrete Offer to Looming Bayern Munich Free Agent
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been closely monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, nearly signing him last summer. Now, they are once again pushing to bring him to the club, with one pundit urging them to secure the veteran.
